key.name: panel-position
key.description: Position of the media controls indicator in the panel (left, center, right)

key.name: panel-index
key.description: Index within the chosen panel area (-1 = automatic)

key.name: show-track-name
key.description: Display track title next to the panel icon while media is playing

key.name: show-artist
key.description: Append the artist name to the track title shown in the panel

key.name: separator-text
key.description: Text inserted between the track title and artist name in the panel label

key.name: enable-panel-scroll
key.description: Scroll the track/artist label in the top panel. When off, text is truncated with an ellipsis.

key.name: scroll-speed
key.description: Speed of panel text scrolling: 1 = slowest, 10 = fastest

key.name: max-title-length
key.description: Maximum characters shown in the panel label when scrolling is disabled

key.name: enable-title-scroll
key.description: Scroll long track titles inside the popup media player

key.name: title-scroll-speed
key.description: Speed of title scrolling in the popup: 1 = slowest, 10 = fastest

key.name: enable-artist-scroll
key.description: Scroll long artist names inside the popup media player

key.name: artist-scroll-speed
key.description: Speed of artist scrolling in the popup: 1 = slowest, 10 = fastest

key.name: vinyl-app-ids
key.description: List of desktop-entry IDs (e.g. "spotify", "rhythmbox") for which the rotating vinyl record effect is active. Managed via the Vinyl Apps preferences page or by double-clicking the album art in the popup.

key.name: vinyl-app-disabled-ids
key.summary: Apps with vinyl effect explicitly disabled
key.description: List of desktop-entry IDs that have been seen and explicitly disabled by the user. These are remembered so the user can re-enable them from the Vinyl Apps page without searching again.

key.name: vinyl-app-instances
key.description: JSON-encoded list of {id, name, desktopId, busName} objects. Each entry represents a player instance the user stored by double-clicking the album art in the popup. The prefs page shows these and resolves their icons from the system .desktop database.

key.name: enable-album-art-rotation
key.description: Spin the album art as a vinyl record while music plays; pauses when paused, stops when stopped

key.name: album-art-rotation-speed
key.description: Seconds per full rotation: 5 = fastest, 60 = slowest

key.name: enable-lyrics
key.description: Fetch and display time-synced lyrics from lrclib.net. Triple-click the album art in the popup to show/hide lyrics while a track is playing.
